label: Embedding
description: Generate vector embeddings for one or more texts via the platform's /api/v1/embeddings endpoint. Falls back to /api/v1/vector/embed on primary failure.

settings.name: model
settings.label: Model
settings.description: Embedding model name. Leave blank to use the platform's configured default.

settings.name: batchSize
settings.label: Batch size
settings.description: Maximum number of texts sent in a single request.

ai.whenToUse: Before vector_store / vector search — convert chunks (or a single text) into embeddings.
ai.examplePrompt: embed the chunked document text in batches of 50
ai.promptHints: Accepts a single string, an array of strings, or { chunks: [...] }. Reference vectors via {{steps.<id>.result.vectors}}.
